meta.defaultDescription: {businessName} offers hair, barbering, nails, spa, and massage with transparent pricing and online booking you can trust.{suffix}
meta.homeDescription: Looking for a barber near you? Book online at {businessName} for on-time visits, precision cuts, fades, and beard shaping tailored to your texture, lifestyle, and calendar.{suffix}

pageMeta.bookingsDescription: Pick services and a time at {businessName}.
pageMeta.appointmentsDescription: View and manage your visits at {businessName}.

footer.tagline: Professional salon & spa experiences with straightforward booking.

hero.body: Searching for a barber near me? Book online at {businessName}, arrive on time, and leave with a cut shaped for your texture, lifestyle, and calendar.
hero.sameDayBody: When the schedule allows, grab a last-minute slot before it disappears — open the booking calendar, pick what you need, and lock the time in seconds.
hero.imageAlt: Guest in the chair during a careful beard trim and precision haircut at {businessName}.

services.heading: Signature services
services.subheading: A snapshot of what we offer — see the full menu for every treatment and add-on.

classicCut.name: Classic cut & finish
classicCut.description: Consultation, precision cut, and blow-dry or style finish.

skinFade.name: Skin fade
skinFade.description: Clean taper with detailed lineup and finish.

beardSculpt.name: Beard sculpt
beardSculpt.description: Shape, trim, and crisp edges mapped to your jawline.

hotTowel.name: Hot towel finish
hotTowel.description: Relaxing steam towels and cooling balm after your service.

gallery.label: Gallery
gallery.heading: Texture & tone
gallery.body: A look inside our space — cuts, color, nails, and spa rooms.

testimonial.label: Clients say
testimonial.quote: “Easy booking, clear prices, and the team actually listens.”

team.label: Team
team.heading: People behind the chair
team.body: Stylists, therapists, and nail artists — meet everyone on the team page.

contact.label: Visit
contact.heading: Ready when you are
contact.body: Pick a service from the menu, choose a time, and sign in to confirm.

errorPage.descDefault: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or share details with support.
errorPage.descNetwork: Check your internet connection and try again.
errorPage.descNotFound: That page does not exist or was moved.
errorPage.descServer: The server had a problem. Please try again in a moment.
errorPage.footerFallback: If buttons do not work, copy the error text above.

bookingsPage.pageIntro: Choose services from the menu, pick a time, and add notes. Sign in when you are ready to confirm.
bookingsPage.reminderNote: We can send SMS and email reminders before your visit and a thank-you with receipt details afterward, using the phone and email on your account.
bookingsPage.toastBookingCreatedHeld: Your appointment is booked — we have held this time slot.
bookingsPage.toastPaymentCompleteInDialog: Complete payment in the window to finish.
bookingsPage.toastPaymentUsePayNow: Pay online with Pay now on your booking, or settle in person at the salon.
bookingsPage.toastPaymentDismissedReserve: Please make a payment to fully reserve your time slot.
bookingsPage.receiptGuest: Guest — sign in to attach this appointment to your account.
bookingsPage.removeServiceConfirmDescription: It will be taken out of your appointment. You can add it again from the service list.
bookingsPage.listSignInPrompt: Sign in to see your schedule, reschedule, or cancel appointments.
bookingsPage.emptyNoneYet: No appointments yet — add your first from the booking page.

appointmentsPage.title: My appointments
appointmentsPage.intro: Filter by day on the calendar, pay online, or update your upcoming visits.

accountPage.intro: Jump to appointments or orders. Use the avatar in the header for account settings.
accountPage.signInBlurb: Sign in to sync your appointments and orders across devices.

ordersPage.signInVisitsPrompt: Sign in to see completed visits from your appointments and your purchase orders.

stylesPage.title: Service menu
stylesPage.description: Browse our full menu — filter by category, see pricing, and book what you need.

stylesCatalog.emptySeed: No styles yet. Seed the catalog in Postgres or run the server seed script.

adminSettings.title: Site settings
adminSettings.subtitle: Business profile, hours, notifications, and theme tokens used across the site and API.
adminSettings.openingHours: Opening hours (one line per day or range)
